study.name: H2Q-MC-LZZT
study.description: Patients with probable mild to moderate AD will be studied in a randomized, double-blind, parallel (3 arm), placebo-controlled trial of 26 weeks duration. The study will be conducted on an outpatient basis. Approximately 300 patients will be enrolled
study.label: Alzheimer Study

studyDesigns.name: Darren
studyDesigns.label: Alzheimer Study
studyDesigns.description: Patients with probable mild to moderate AD will be studied in a randomized, double-blind, parallel (3 arm), placebo-controlled trial of 26 weeks duration. The study will be conducted on an outpatient basis. Approximately 300 patients will be enrolled

transitionEndRule.name: ENCOUNTER_START_RULE_2
transitionEndRule.text: subject leaves clinic after connection of ambulatory ECG machine

transitionStartRule.name: ENCOUNTER_START_RULE_3
transitionStartRule.text: subject has connection of ambulatory ECG machine removed

activities.name: Adverse Events
activities.label: Adverse Events
activities.description: Activities to conduct if occurence of Adverse Event

transitionEndRule.name: ELEMENT_END_RULE_1
transitionEndRule.text: Completion of all screening activities and no more than 2 weeks from informed consent

elements.name: EL5
elements.label: High - Middle
elements.description: Xanomeline TTS (adhesive patches) 50 cm2, 54 mg + 25 cm2, 27 mg

estimands.name: Estimand 1
estimands.label: Estimand 1
estimands.populationSummary: Group mean changes from baseline in the primary efficacy parameters

intercurrentEvents.name: Disruption
intercurrentEvents.label: Disruption
intercurrentEvents.description: The disruption of treatment to the subject
intercurrentEvents.strategy: Treatment Policy. Continue to measure effect of treatment assignment regardless of interruption.

objectives.name: OBJ1
objectives.label: Objective 1
objectives.text: To determine if there is a statistically significant relationship (overall Type 1 erroralpha=0.05) between the change in both the ADAS-Cog (11) and CIBIC+ scores, and drug dose (0, 50 cm2 [54 mg], and 75 cm2 [81 mg]).

endpoints.name: ENDPT1
endpoints.label: Endpoint 1
endpoints.text: Alzheimer's Disease Assessment Scale - Cognitive Subscale, total of 11 items [ADAS-Cog (11)] at Week 24

endpoints.name: ENDPT2
endpoints.label: Endpoint 2
endpoints.text: Video-referenced Clinician\u2019s Interview-based Impression of Change (CIBIC+) at Week 24

objectives.name: OBJ2
objectives.label: Objective 2
objectives.text: To document the safety profile of the xanomeline TTS.

endpoints.name: ENDPT4
endpoints.label: Endpoint 4
endpoints.text: Vital signs (weight, standing and supine blood pressure, heart rate)

endpoints.name: ENDPT5
endpoints.label: Endpoint 5
endpoints.text: The change from baseline laboratory value will be  calculated as the difference between the baseline lab value and the endpoint value (i.e., the value at the specified visit) or the end of treatment observation",                     "text": "Laboratory evaluations (Change from Baseline)

objectives.name: OBJ3
objectives.label: Objective 3
objectives.text: To assess the dose-dependent improvement in behavior. Improved scores on the Revised Neuropsychiatric Inventory (NPI-X) will indicate improvement in these areas.

endpoints.name: ENDPT6
endpoints.label: Endpoint 6
endpoints.text: Alzheimer's Disease Assessment Scale - Cognitive Subscale, total of 11 items [ADAS-Cog (11)] at Weeks 8 and 16

endpoints.name: ENDPT7
endpoints.label: Endpoint 7
endpoints.description: Clinician impression at Week8 and Week16
endpoints.text: Video-referenced Clinician\u2019s Interview-based Impression of Change (CIBIC+) at Weeks 8 and 16

endpoints.name: ENDPT8
endpoints.label: Endpoint 8
endpoints.text: Mean Revised Neuropsychiatric Inventory (NPI-X) from Week 4 to Week 24

objectives.name: OBJ4
objectives.label: Objective 4
objectives.text: To assess the dose-dependent improvements in activities of daily living. Improved scores on the Disability Assessment for Dementia (DAD) will indicate improvement in these areas (see Attachment LZZT.5).

objectives.name: OBJ5
objectives.label: Objective 5
objectives.text: To assess the dose-dependent improvements in an extended assessment of cognition that integrates attention/concentration tasks. The Alzheimer's Disease Assessment Scale-14 item Cognitive Subscale, hereafter referred to as ADAS-Cog (14), will be used for this assessment (see Attachment LZZT.2).

objectives.name: OBJ6
objectives.label: Objective 6
objectives.text: To assess the treatment response as a function of Apo E genotype.
